channel.title: Groadio - The Premier Gravel Cycling & Racing Podcast
channel.itunes:summary: If you are a fan of gravel cycling, this is the podcast for you. Amanda Nauman and Bill Schieken talk gravel racing, gear, race profiles, recaps, preparation, and all things gravel bike riding.

item.title: Ep 117 | Caleb Bottcher
item.itunes:title: Ep 117 | Caleb Bottcher
item.description:
Amanda chats with Mammoth Tuff winner Caleb Bottcher about finding success on gravel, the Kiwi invasion, making it as a privateer, and balancing a job outside of cycling while racing a full calendar.

Groadio is sponsored by Hammerhead. Right now, our listeners can get a free Heart-Rate Monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code GROADIO at checkout to get yours today.

This is exclusive for our listeners, so don't forget to use promo code GROADIO. You'll get a free Heart-Rate Monitor with your purchase of a Karoo. Go to Hammerhead.io today, add both items to your cart, and use promo code GROADIO.

You can follow Amanda on Twitter at @_amanda_panda_ and on Instagram at @amanda_panda_.

Follow Bill at cxhairs.com. Subscribe to the CXHAIRS Bulletin at cxhairs.substack.com.

Follow the show on Instagram at @groadio.

Email the show at groadio@gmail.com.

item.title: Ep 115 | Mega Mid South FKT with Dave Sheek and Hank DeArruda-Weaver
item.itunes:title: Ep 115 | Mega Mid South FKT with Dave Sheek and Hank DeArruda-Weaver
item.description:
Amanda chats with Dave Sheek and filmmaker Hank DeArruda-Weaver about her FKT attempt on the 300-mile Mega Mid South route and the film for Niner Bikes that chronicles the experience.

Check out the video on the Niner YouTube page at https://youtu.be/8TA70D9tkyI?si=KkUrNWgEszWvAGyG.

Follow Hank at @hankweaves.

item.title: Ep 110 | Dan Hughes
item.itunes:title: Ep 110 | Dan Hughes
item.description:
Dan Hughes, four-time Unbound 200 winner and Gravel Cycling Hall of Fame inductee, joins Amanda to chat about the early days of gravel, winning Unbound and proving it wasn't a fluke. Dan also talks about selling his bike shop and becoming a full-time photographer and content producer for Lifetime.

Follow Dan on Instagram at @dhughes101.

item.title: Ep 109 | Matt Wilson and Cam Jones
item.itunes:title: Ep 109 | Matt Wilson and Cam Jones
item.description:
Matt Wilson and Cam Jones chat with Amanda about leaving New Zealand to race bikes in North America, embracing the gravel scene, and chasing Lifetime Grand Prix wildcard spots. This episode was recorded before Matt and Cam raced Whiskey Off Road.

Follow Cam on Instagram at @camjonesnz.

item.title: Ep 106 | Russell Finsterwald
item.itunes:title: Ep 106 | Russell Finsterwald
item.description:
Russell Finsterwald joins Amanda and Bill to chat about setting aside a successful cross-country mountain bike career to become a pro gravel racer, his switch from the Specialized program to Trek Driftless, successfully figuring out how to race his bike and be financially secure, and his friendship/rivalry with Keegan Swenson.

You can follow Russell on Instagram at @Finsty.

Follow the Bikeflights Vlog on YouTube at https://www.youtube.com/@finsty9.

The Pikes Peak APEX gravel race in Colorado Springs, Colorado, is a brand new gravel race with two distances to choose from. It will take place on Sunday, June 8, 2025. For more information, visit www.pikespeakapex.com.

You can follow Lauren at @lollyis_lauren.

item.title: Ep 98 | Griffin Easter
item.itunes:title: Ep 98 | Griffin Easter
item.description:
Griffin Easter chats with Amanda about transitioning from road to gravel, struggling with the discipline in 2023 and his 2024 breakout season. Griffin also talks about the team he started with his brother to promote the OpiCure Foundation, which they also run.

You can follow Griffin on Instagram at @gmeaster91.

item.title: Ep 93 | Courtney Sherwell
item.itunes:title: Ep 93 | Courtney Sherwell
item.description:
Amanda chats with Australian Gravel and Marathon MTB National Champion Courtney Sherwell about finding solace in gravel riding and racing after a stint on the road, her second-place finish at BWR California and in the BWR Triple Crown series, and a side hustle drawing pet portraits.

You can follow Courtney at @courtney.sherwell and her pet portrait business at @petportraits_bycourtney.

item.title: Midfield Report No. 10 | Dave Sheek and Mama Nauman on Unbound XL and 50
item.itunes:title: Midfield Report No. 10 | Dave Sheek and Mama Nauman on Unbound XL and 50
item.description:
It's a family affair on this episode of the Midfield Report as Amanda chats with Dave about his 2024 Unbound XL ride and how it compares to 2023. They get into gear, feeding, outside support questions and how everyone has a plan until it is the middle of the night and you are standing on the only hill you can find with phone service, with a bike balanced on your shoulders, trying to figure out why you can't shift and if you mixed your bottles properly.

Amanda then chats with her mom about riding the 50-mile route at Unbound. They discuss training, feeding, cramping and lessons learned from a first-time finisher.

You can follow Dave at @dsheek.

item.title: Ep 91 | Hannah Otto
item.itunes:title: Ep 91 | Hannah Otto
item.description:
Hannah Otto—winner of Leadville, the Snowshoe XCM World Cup, and Midsouth, to name but a few—joins Amanda and Bill for a conversation on starting in triathlon and the value of competing in a variety of disciplines, the decision to put XCO racing on the backburner to concentrate on endurance events, and how the historic women's race at Unbound Gravel played out.

You can follow Hannah on Instagram at @hannah_finchamp and her website, hannahfinchamp.com.

For in-depth analysis of the MTB season, consider subscribing to the CXHAIRS Bulletin, available at cxhairs.substack.com.

item.itunes:title: Ep 83 | Caroline Dezendorf
item.description:
You haven't made it as a podcast until you've had a lost episode. Amanda and Caroline Dezendorf took care of that this past August after a conversation went unrecorded. With Caroline competing in the Mid South double, Amanda reached out for a redo and the result is a fantastic conversation with so many great stories from Caroline. Who says there are no second chances in podcasting?

item.description:

item.title: Ep 79 | Deannna Mayles
item.itunes:title: Ep 79 | Deannna Mayles
item.description:
Deanna Mayles joins Amanda and Bill to discuss her fast rise in the gravel world, her beginnings in mountain bike racing, and how she balances a career as an engineer for SRAM with a full racing calendar, including the Life Time Grand Prix. Amanda and Deanna also talk about her recent win at the Rock Cobbler. The conversation ends with another great round of Tuff Takes.

Follow Deanna on Instagram at @Deanna.Mayles.

You can follow Amanda on Twitter at @_amanda_panda_ and on Instagram at @amanda_panda_.

item.title: Ep 78 | Ted King
item.itunes:title: Ep 78 | Ted King
item.description:
Ted King joins Amanda to discuss his plans for 2024 and how they differ from his past gravel racing seasons. Ted explains that he is training seriously again for the first time since retiring from the World Tour and is coming into this season with more focus. The conversation ends with a great round of Tuff Takes.

Follow Ted on Instagram at @iamtedking. And on his website: www.iamtedking.com and on YouTube at www.youtube.com/@TedKing1.

This week's episode is brought to you by Valley of Tears Gravel, a new event that introduces riders to scenic canyons and the historic Quitaque Peaks. Registration for the event is only $20! Find more information and register at www.valleyoftearsgravel.com. 

Groadio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. Our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor for a limited time by purchasing a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code GROADIO at checkout to get yours today.

item.title: Ep 77 | Micah Rice
item.itunes:title: Ep 77 | Micah Rice
item.description:
Micah Rice joins Amanda and Bill to discuss his career path that took him from a professional road racer and team director to head of national events at USA Cycling and finally to gravel and mountain bike race director and consultant. Micah runs the Pikes Peak APEX p/b Rock Shox MTB stage race and is the race director for SBT GRVL and the new Valley of Tears gravel event in Turkey, Texas.

Valley of Tears is a new event that introduces riders to scenic canyons and the historic Quitaque Peaks. Registration for the event is only $20! Find more information and register at www.valleyoftearsgravel.com. 

Follow Valley of Tears at @valleyoftearsgravel

Follow SBT GRVL at @sbtgrvl

and follow APEX Pikes Peak at @pikespeakapex

Groadio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. Our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor for a limited time by purchasing a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code GROADIO at checkout to get yours today.

You can follow Amanda on Twitter at @_amanda_panda_ and on Instagram at @amanda_panda_.

item.title: Ep 75 | Life Time Grand Prix Preview with Chris Mehlman
item.itunes:title: Ep 75 | Life Time Grand Prix Preview with Chris Mehlman
item.description:
Amanda and Bill are joined by Chris Mehlman to preview the 2024 Life Time Grand Prix. We concentrate on who's back, who isn't and the rookies for next year's LTGP. We also talk about the changes we liked from year one to year two and what we look forward to in year three.

Sign up for Chris' newsletter and follow him on Instagram at @cmehlman34.

Follow Morgan on Instagram at @morgan_aguirre.

item.itunes:title: Midfield Report No. 5 | Lance Haidet

Lance Haidet (Legion of Los Angeles) joins Amanda to chat about how a family move to the Pacific Northwest turned him into a bike racer, the challenges of racing cyclocross in a gravel-dominated calendar, his recent injury struggles, and the demands of the Life Time Grand Prix events. 

Follow Lance on Instagram at @lancy_pants.

item.title: Ep 69 | Keegan Swenson
item.itunes:title: Ep 69 | Keegan Swenson
item.description:
2023 Unbound 200 winner Keegan Swenson (Santa Cruz Hit Squad) joins Amanda and Bill to chat about his early racing career and chasing success in international cross-country mountain biking, his transition to an endurance athlete and gravel racer and how this year's Unbound played out. Along with his Unbound victory, Keegan has a closet full of national champion jerseys from XCO, XCC and marathon MTB as well as wins at Leadville 100, Telluride 100, Breckenridge Epic, and Pikes Peak Apex.

Follow Keegan on Instagram at @keegels99. 

This episode is sponsored by Mammoth Tuff. Join Amanda and Dave Sheek September 15-17 in Mammoth, CA, for what some are saying (read: Dave) is the hardest 100 miles on gravel, anywhere. Find your tuff at this year's event, which includes not only great riding in California's Eastern Sierra but also a  beer run on Friday and live music on Saturday. For more information and links to registration, go to www.tuff.ventures/mtuff.

Groadio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. Our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor for a limited time by purchasing a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code GROADIO at checkout to get yours today.

You can follow Amanda on Twitter at @_amanda_panda_ and on Instagram at @amanda_panda_.

Follow Bill at @cxhairs  on Instagram and Twitter.

Follow the show on Twitter @groadio and also on Instagram at @groadio.

item.title: Midfield Report No. 4 | Tobin Ortenblad
item.itunes:title: Midfield Report No. 4 | Tobin Ortenblad
item.description:
Tobin Ortenblad joins Amanda and Bill for a raucous episode of The Midfield Report, our bonus content focusing on riders of note in the middle of the gravel pack. This episode was recorded a week after Tobin finished 18th at Unbound. Ortenblad made his name as a top cyclocross racer in the US before joining the Santa Cruz Hit Squad and tackling the biggest gravel and MTB races in the country. This is a good one, y'all. 

Follow Tobin on Instagram at @mctubbbin.

If you're listening to this bonus content, please consider becoming a member of the Wide Angle Podium podcast network and supporting Groadio with your membership. item.title: Midfield Report No. 3 | Cecily Decker and Jonas Woodruff
item.itunes:title: Midfield Report No. 3 | Cecily Decker and Jonas Woodruff
item.description:
Cecily Decker and Jonas Woodruff are Amanda's latest guests on The Midfield Report, our bonus content focusing on riders of note in the middle of the gravel pack. Amanda chatted with Cecily about her transition from ski racing to bike racing and the success she has found racing gravel and on the road. Amanda and Jonas talk about being a young gun and mixing it up with some of the top racers in the world at BWR before recapping the Sea Otter El Fuego race. 

Follow Cecily on Instagram at @cecily_decker.

Follow Jonas on Instagram at @jonaswoodruff_.

If you're listening to this bonus content, please consider becoming a member of the Wide Angle Podium podcast network and supporting Groadio with your membership. Follow Cecily on Instagram at @cecily_decker.

Follow Jonas on Instagram at @jonaswoodruff_.

item.title: Ep 63 | Amy Charity and Ryan Steers (SBT and FNLD GRVL)
item.itunes:title: Ep 63 | Amy Charity and Ryan Steers (SBT and FNLD GRVL)
item.description:
Amy Charity is the co-founder and owner of SBT GRVL and founder/partner of FNLD GRVL.  Ryan Steers is the marketing director for SBT GRVL and FNLD GRVL. Amanda chats with Amy and Ryan about their transition from bike racers to event organizers, what SBT GRVL will look like without Leadville happening the day before, the exciting premiere of FNLD GRVL presented by Alfa Romeo F1 Team and Kick and GRVL's upcoming gravel tour in Portugal. We also have a cameo appearance from episode 60 guest Alexey Vermeulen.

Find out more about SBT GRVL at www.sbtgrvl.com and follow on Instagram at @sbtgrvl. Find more on FNLD GRVL at www.fnldgrvl.com  and follow the event at @fnldgrvl.

Follow Amy on Instagram at @amymcharity.

Follow Ryan at @rsteers.

item.title: Ep 62 | Curtis White
item.itunes:title: Ep 62 | Curtis White
item.description:
US Cyclocross National Champion Curtis White joined Amanda at Sea Otter to chat about the transition from cyclocross to gravel racing. Amanda and Curtis also talk about attention to detail in racing, the challenges of building your brand, and how cyclocross racing can make you a better gravel racer.

Follow Curtis on Instagram at @curtisjwhite and listen to Curtis' In The Red podcast at podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/in-the-red-with-curtis-white/id1542980516.

item.title: Ep 61 | Paige Onweller
item.itunes:title: Ep 61 | Paige Onweller
item.description:
Professional gravel cyclist Paige Onweller joined Amanda at Sea Otter to chat about the transition from runner, physician's assistant, and Zwift racer, to full-time gravel professional. Amanda and Paige talk about Belgian Waffle Ride California, the evolving gravel scene, the Life Time Grand Prix and equality in sport.

Follow Paige on Instagram at @paigepowered and follow her blog at www.paigepowered.com.

Big thanks to Miir for hosting this episode at their Sea Otter pop up. Check them out on Instagram at @miir.

item.title: Ep 58 | Kerry Werner
item.itunes:title: Ep 58 | Kerry Werner
item.description:
Kerry Werner started his cycling career as a cross-country mountain bike racer. He then moved on to racing cyclocross at the highest level before adding gravel racing to his toolbox. We talk about Kerry's early days racing bikes before moving on to how the gravel life has been treating him. We also talk about his gravel racing strategy and how it played out at Midsouth.

Check out Kerry's touring and adventure business, Virginia Blue Ridge Adventures at https://www.vbradventures.com/.

Also, follow him on YouTube and Instagram at @kerryw24.

Groadio is sponsored by Hammerhead and the Karoo 2. For a limited time, our listeners can get a free heart-rate monitor with the purchase of a Hammerhead Karoo 2. Visit hammerhead.io right now and use promo code GROADIO at checkout to get yours today.

Check out Haley's and Lespy's podcast Offroad Inroads at https://offroadinroads.buzzsprout.com/ and Haley's blog at https://www.haleyhuntersmith.com/blog.htm.

item.description:
The whole Groadio crew convened to countdown the first installment of the eagerly anticipated 2022 Groadio Power Rankings. Did we get it right? Of course, we did. But that doesn't mean the list is void of controversy.
